policy_description: This step materializes ready candidate records only.
Ready candidates are not final dataset samples.
Ready candidates are not training samples.
No final dataset artifact is written.
No sample index artifact is written.
No split or leakage artifact is written.
Feature semantics audit remains required before training.
Leakage/split gate remains required before training.
The canonical five masks remain unchanged.
Blocked inputs are not materialized as ready candidates.
Ready candidate inventory is not a training input.
